steps.title: Contrast eras and periods
steps.content: The first sentence says geological era names uniformly describe phases in Earth's evolutionary history. The next sentence says period names have diverse origins, giving examples from a Russian region and a Celtic tribe.

steps.title: Signal opposition
steps.content: A signals a result, but diverse period names do not follow from uniform era names. B suggests sequence or reciprocity. D signals addition, not contrast. The sentence needs a transition that opposes uniformity with diversity. The answer is C.
